name: process-design-plugin
description: Process Design with extra benefits — a thought-partner skill that walks you from fuzzy intuition to a build-ready spec, bundled with qa-agents (adversarial review) and dmaic (Define/Measure/Analyze/Improve/Control) for verification and metrics review.

plugins.name: process-design
plugins.description: Eight composable skills for designing processes that build agents can actually execute. The headliner walks you through Working Backwards, metrics design, Elon's algorithm, gap probing, TDD-style verification, drafting, adversarial verification, and build handoff. Sibling skills qa-agents (Finder/Auditor/Referee adversarial review) and dmaic + 5 phase skills (Define/Measure/Analyze/Improve/Control) are independently invokable.
